{{Infobox artifact
| name = Skysworn armor
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

''See also: [[Skysworn armor Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Skysworn]] armor consists of specialized green or [[jade]]-colored protective suits worn by members of the [[Skysworn]], a group of [[sacred artists]] serving as judges and law enforcers within the [[Blackflame Empire]]. These suits are highly respected uniforms that grant the wearer the ability to fly and serve as a status symbol. The armor is equipped with various integrated constructs, such as dream displays for communication, defensive wind barriers, and Thousand-Mile Clouds for mobility. It also features protective [[scripts]] designed to weaken spiritual attacks and hostile [[madra]], as well as specialized head defenses. While highly effective, the armor requires significant maintenance and power; constructs must be fueled by compatible [[madra]] or replaced after a few days of use. The armor's weaponry is uniquely keyed to specific individuals or the [[Skysworn]] organization, allowing for remote deactivation or tracking. Advanced versions of these suits can be produced at the [[Skysworn]]'s [[Soulsmith foundry]], which is capable of creating constructs for high-level fighters like Underlords.}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Gwei]] wears battered [[Skysworn armor]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Skysworn armor]] is famous and can release a pulse of emerald wind madra from its plates.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Worn by both [[Yerin]] and [[Lindon]], the [[Skysworn]] armor features defensive constructs that protect the head and a triggered wind barrier. This specialized gear can generate an [[emerald]] green cloud and may include a dream [[construct]] for the transmission of messages. While officials wearing the armor are granted easy passage through air traffic, [[Lindon]] eventually finds his own set cracked. Following these events, [[Mercy]] has removed her armor, and [[Lindon]] plans to use his [[void key]] to retrieve his damaged suit.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Skysworn armor]] contains defensive constructs that cover the head.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Skysworn armor]] can include a dream [[construct]] for transmitting messages.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Skysworn armor]] has a triggered wind barrier defense.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] and [[Lindon]] wear [[Skysworn armor]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Officials in [[Skysworn armor]] are allowed to pass through air traffic easily.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Skysworn armor]] can create an [[emerald]] green cloud.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] intends to retrieve his [[Skysworn armor]] using his [[void key]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14">''Underlord'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]]'s [[Skysworn armor]] is cracked.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] has removed her [[Skysworn armor]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] kept his [[Skysworn armor]] in his [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]]'s [[Skysworn armor]] contained an emergency [[binding]] of [[Grasping Sky madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|“There are defensive constructs in the armor that cover the head.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Lindon wasted not a second in tearing open his void key. “I'm getting my Skysworn armor.”<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
